modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about ITS charges for software services

full_description_text: 
El usuario pregunta si ITS cobra por hosting, mantenimiento o administración de software. No está claro si hay costos asociados. Necesita saber esto para planificar su presupuesto.
short_description: Inquiry about ITS charges for software services
description: El usuario pregunta si ITS cobra por hosting, mantenimiento o administración de software. No está claro si hay costos asociados. Necesita saber esto para planificar su presupuesto.
